title: POST /books endpoint
evidence: src/main/java/com/example/App.java:30-35 implements POST /books with full Book object creation; BookApiTest.java:67-75 tests creation with validation

title: GET /books endpoint with optional author filter
evidence: src/main/java/com/example/App.java:25-28 implements GET /books with optional author query param; BookDao.java:51-65 implements conditional SQL; BookApiTest.java:92-101 verifies filter

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/main/java/com/example/App.java:37-41 implements GET /books/{id}; BookApiTest.java:85-89 verifies retrieval

title: PUT /books/{id} update endpoint
evidence: src/main/java/com/example/App.java:43-50 implements PUT /books/{id}; BookApiTest.java:104-108 verifies update

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/main/java/com/example/App.java:52-56 implements DELETE /books/{id}; BookApiTest.java:110-114 verifies deletion

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: pom.xml:27-30 adds sqlite-jdbc dependency; BookDao.java uses SQLite JDBC for all operations

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: App.java:23,34,40,48,54 use appropriate status codes (200, 201, 400, 404, 204); all responses use ctx.json()

title: Input validation (title and author required)
evidence: App.java:64-69 validate() checks title and author non-null/non-blank; BookApiTest.java:78-82 verifies validation fails correctly

title: GET /health endpoint
evidence: App.java:23 implements GET /health with {status: ok}; BookApiTest.java:60-64 verifies endpoint

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: BookApiTest.java contains 6 tests: health, createBook, createValidationFails, getById, listAndFilter, updateAndDelete
